overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game showing a character with a flashlight exploring a dark industrial basement or warehouse. The character interacts with an NPC and searches through cluttered rooms, storage cages, and narrow corridors with graffiti-covered walls.

rusted metal railing along the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a very dark, narrow industrial corridor with a flashlight. Metal railings line the walls as the character approaches a doorway leading to a larger space.

wooden desk covered with papers and office supplies

large whiteboard with map or diagram drawn on it

segments.scene_description: The character enters a larger warehouse room with dim overhead lighting. An NPC in a suit stands near a cluttered desk. The character explores the space, examining a map on a whiteboard while metal shelving and concrete pillars define the industrial environment.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow back corridor with walls covered in graffiti. Exposed pipes run along the ceiling above stacked wooden crates. After examining the graffiti, the character turns back toward the main warehouse area.

metal shelving units holding various containers and supplies
tall metal locker with doors that open to reveal contents
simple bed with mattress against the wall
small table with lit lamp next to the bed

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a chain-link fence gate into a caged storage area with metal shelving. Continuing into a small bedroom, the character approaches a single bed and opens a metal locker to search for items, illuminated by a bedside lamp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, dark corridor into a dimly lit industrial warehouse. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to illuminate metal railings lining the walls. As the character approaches and passes through a doorway, the oppressive confinement shifts into a larger open space defined by concrete pillars and metal shelving. The scene then expands to reveal a cluttered warehouse room with dim overhead lighting, where the character interacts with an NPC in a suit and examines a map on a whiteboard.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, graffiti-strewn corridor into a cluttered, dimly lit storage area. It begins by navigating a narrow back hallway where exposed pipes line the ceiling and wooden crates stack against walls covered in street art. As the character turns away from the graffiti, the camera moves through a chain-link fence gate, shifting the environment from an open corridor to a confined caged storage zone filled with metal shelving. The scene then expands into a small bedroom, where the lighting transitions from the flashlight's beam to the warm glow of a bedside lamp. Finally, the camera closes in as the character approaches a single bed and opens a metal locker to search for items.
